column8: port build_results_table mirrors orig per-slot loop: rand()&0x1F finish-time synth gated on state!=3, championship/ultimate point table additions, primary/secondary metric accumulation. Per-checkpoint split-time synth relocated to race-time (real lap times in lap_split_times[]); semantically equivalent.

port sort_results_by_time_asc bubble-sorts s_race_order with `primary_metric*100/30` ascending compare; mirrors orig points_bonus*100/0x1e (Ghidra field-name mislabel). Adjacent-element scratch matches orig &g_raceResultsSortScratchBuffer[i]==g_raceOrderTable[i+1] (0x004ae278/0x004ae279).

port sort_results_by_score_desc bubble-sorts s_race_order descending by secondary_metric; mirrors orig lap_time_total compare with swap-when-current<scratch. Final-position writeback identical. Adjacent scratch identity holds.

port td5_track_prepare_mesh_resource keeps step-1 pointer relocation (commands/vertices/normals offsets). Omits orig per-vertex UV half-texel inset (D3D11 sampler handles edges), GetTextureSlotStatus opcode-rewrite (no D3D3 primitive tags), per-face cull-flag prepass (port culls per-frame). All three documented in port header.

port td5_render_begin_scene routes orig DXD3D::BeginScene() through td5_plat_render_begin_scene; texture-page handles invalidated via -1 sentinels (semantic equiv of orig 0xffffffff). Adds per-frame debug counter resets needed by D3D11 path. Documented inline.
